title: Update Charon to 419f53b6 and Aeneas to 1180be60 (upstream sync)
description:
Update the Charon/Aeneas verification toolchain from our current pin (Charon 24a17b5e + 3 local patches) to Charon 419f53b6 + Aeneas 1180be60.

Phase 1 (done): Built Charon at 419f53b6 with ported patches (#1b erase, #2b lookup fallback, #3 implied clause propagation). Pipeline runs through Charon extraction and Aeneas translation successfully. Zero "Could not compute" warnings.

Phase 2 (remaining): Fix Lean proof breakage in Defs.lean, ExtProgress.lean, and Gf2mProgress.lean caused by changes in generated code. Update CI, patch file, and docs.
